items.title: ‘All I think about is her’: Families demand answers as Nigeria's boat disasters keep happening
items.dek: Hundreds of lives are lost each year in Nigeria as a result of boat accidents yet nothing seems to change.
items.body: Hundreds of lives are lost each year in Nigeria as a result of boat accidents yet nothing seems to change.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lamine Yamal celebrates World Cup win with little brother who charmed fans
